title: Drag-and-Drop
description: Перетащите элемент с ID source на элемент с ID target.
hint: Используйте actions().dragAndDrop(source, target).perform() для перетаскивания элемента на цель.

elements.style: max-width: 700px; margin: 40px auto; background: white; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(72, 187, 120, 0.15); padding: 35px;

children.style: display: flex; gap: 30px; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 30px;

width: 80px; height: 80px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: 600; cursor: grab; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4);
width: 150px; height: 150px; background: #f8f9fa; border: 3px dashed #38a169; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #38a169; font-weight: 600;
